meaning: n.航程,航空,航海记,旅行记vi.航海,航行vt.渡过,飞过
examples: He saw life as a voyage of discovery.
This voyage was his first taste of freedom.
In 1912, the Titanic sank on her maiden voyage.
On her return voyage to the Philippines, the Indianapolis was sunk by Japanese submarine torpedoes.
To celebrate the golden anniversary of that first voyage, he returned to the Sheenjek.
